1.description: Get geometry (as GeoJSON) and kommunenummer for Kristiansand

2.description: Get 1km grid cells (id and geom) that intersect the Kristiansand municipality bounding geometry

3.description: Get 200-year storm-surge areas (geom) filtered by relevant municipality bounding box or kommunenummer if available

4.description: Spatially join 1km grid cells with 200-year storm-surge areas to find intersecting cells and count them

args.sql:
SELECT 
 ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))) AS xmin,
 ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))) AS ymin,
 ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))) AS xmax,
 ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,4326))) AS ymax,
 ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM statistiskrutenett1km.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(ST_Transform(geom,4326), ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('NULL'));

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM statistiskrutenett1km.public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('PLACEHOLDER'));
